name: Health Information Act
description: Alberta's health information privacy law (RSA 2000 c H-5). Governs the collection, use, and disclosure of health information by custodians (health-care providers, health regions, ministries) and information managers.
relationToCloudSecurity: Applies to cloud-hosted health information systems used by Alberta custodians.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI systems processing health information under HIA scope.

license.notes: Government publication of Alberta. King's Printer maintains the consolidated text.

current_extraction.notes: Source PDF from Alberta King's Printer (kings-printer.alberta.ca/documents/Acts/H05.pdf), marker-extracted to markdown. extract_alberta_hia.py produces per-section structured CSV/JSON (133 sections including all letter-suffixed amendments).
